## What changed

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Security and privacy

- [ ] Active Directory access remains read-only.
- [ ] No real domain data, reports, credentials, hostnames, or OU structures are included.
- [ ] Output and data-retention implications were reviewed.

## Validation

- [ ] Pester tests pass in Windows PowerShell 5.1.
- [ ] Pester tests pass in PowerShell 7.
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer reports no warnings or errors.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or parameters changed.
